steps.title: Identify the key location detail
steps.content: The passage states manul habitats are in "out-of-the-way parts" of Asia. This phrase indicates remoteness and isolation from populated areas.

steps.title: Apply the location signal to find the fit
steps.content:
Substitute each choice: habitats so ______ large human populations.

A) drawn to — "drawn to large populations" means attracted toward humans. Contradicts "out-of-the-way" and explains nothing about research difficulty. Eliminate.

B) full of — "full of large populations" means densely populated. Directly contradicts a remote, isolated habitat. Eliminate.

C) distant from — "distant from large populations" = remote, hard to reach. Perfectly explains why research is difficult. Keep.

D) responsible for — "responsible for large populations" is grammatically awkward and makes no logical sense in context. Eliminate.

C is correct.
